---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or enhancement
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## What you want

A clear description of the feature.

## Why

What problem this solves, or what workflow it improves. Concrete examples help.

## Alternatives considered

Other ways to solve the same problem (workarounds you've tried, existing features that partially address it, etc.).

## Scope / non-goals

If applicable, what this feature explicitly should NOT do.

## Additional context

Mockups, links, references, related issues.
